items.name: Oil India – Junior Technician, Junior Office Assistant, Junior Engineer – 49 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Oil India Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 49 Junior Technician, Junior Office Assistant, Junior Engineer Posts
basic_details.short_information: Oil India Recruitment 2026 offers 49 new vacancies for Junior Technician, Junior Office Assistant, Junior Engineer posts. Eligible candidates with ITI, Diploma can apply online from 08-05-2026 to 08-06-2026 through the official Oil India website, oil-india.com.
basic_details.organization_name: Oil India Limited - Field Headquarters, Duliajan, Assam
basic_details.post_name: Junior Technician (Electronics Mechanic, Fitter, Instrument Mechanic, Surveyor), Junior Office Assistant, Junior Engineer (Electrical)

selection_process: Computer Based Test (CBT) + Document Verification (No Interview)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Oil India Limited official website (www.oil-india.com) under "Career at OIL" section. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 08-05-2026 (14:00 Hrs) to 08-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs). Candidates can apply for only one post.

items.name: NEIAFMR – Professor, Senior Assistant and More – 35 Posts
items.qualification: MBBS, Any Post Graduate, M.Pharma, M.Sc, M.Phil/Ph.D, MS/MD

basic_details.job_title: NEIAFMR Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 35 Professor, Senior Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: NEIAFMR Recruitment 2026 is now open for 35 vacancies of Professor (Ayurveda)- 1 post, Associate Professor (Ayurveda)- 14 posts, Assistant Professor (Ayurveda)- 2 posts and other posts for qualification as per post, with applications accepted offline from 30 April 2026 to 08 June 2026 through the official website www.neiafmr.org.in.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 45 days from the date of publication of advertisement- 08 June 2026

age_limit.age_details: 55 years for Direct Recruitment, 56 years for Deputation

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate, MBBS, MD, MS, M.Sc, M.pharma

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NEIAFMR Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
